title: Crunchy Boudin Steamer Wrap
description: A unique twist on the traditional steamer basket, filled with crispy boudin, crunchy cnutty, and fresh bamboo shoots.
instructions: Fill the steamer basket with bamboo shoots and boudin.
Steam for 5-7 minutes, or until the boudin is heated through.
Meanwhile, heat a pan over medium-high heat.
Add the crushed cnutty to the pan and cook until crispy, stirring frequently.
Warm the wrap by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by placing the steamed boudin and bamboo mixture onto the center of the wrap.
Top with crispy cnutty and serve immediately.
